name: Charge Lab — move-then-strike riders (D-MON-4c)
description: Bench for Charge / Pounce / Trampling Charge. The beasts start far from the party so the AI has to run them in. When one moves at least its threshold straight toward a hero and then hits, the rider fires: the boar adds tusk damage and forces a STR save vs prone, the lion's Pounce knocks prone on a failed save, and the triceratops' Trampling Charge knocks prone too (note its DC is the stat block's, not 8+prof+STR). Stand a hero right next to a beast at the start of a round and it WON'T charge (no run-up = no rider) — that's the gate working. Heroes are picked for hittable AC (a plate-and-shield tank eats every charge as a miss and you never see the rider).
